nav.announcement: We just launched our new website.

home.title: Great products radiate from a clear core
home.subtitle: We find the core of your digital product and build outward from there — until every layer shines.
home.horizonSubtext: Together, we move towards that point on the horizon.
home.introText: Every great product starts with understanding people. We combine deep user research with modern design practices and AI-powered workflows to create products that truly resonate.
home.aboutText: Radial is a Rotterdam-based design studio that shapes digital products from the center out. We combine deep user research with modern design practices and AI-powered workflows.
home.aboutApproach1Text: Every project starts with understanding the problem space — talking to users, analyzing data, mapping needs.
home.aboutApproach2Text: Every decision has a reason. We create interfaces that are purposeful — every element earns its place.
home.aboutApproach3Text: We use AI throughout our process to work faster without sacrificing quality or craft.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about your next project. We'd love to hear what you're working on.

about.title: About Radial
about.subtitle: We're a small, focused studio that believes great design starts with understanding people.
about.storyText: Radial was founded with a simple belief: digital products should be designed from the center out — starting with real user needs, not assumptions. Based in Rotterdam, we work with startups and scale-ups across Europe to create products people genuinely love to use.
about.approachResearchText: Every project starts with understanding. We talk to users, analyze data, and map out the problem space before touching a single pixel.
about.approachDesignText: Every decision has a reason. We create interfaces that are not just beautiful, but purposeful — every element earns its place.
about.approachAIText: We use AI throughout our process — from research synthesis to prototyping — to work faster without sacrificing quality.
about.approachIterateText: Design is never done. We test with real users, gather feedback, and refine until we get it right.
about.teamBartBio: Bart has over 10 years of experience in digital product design, working with companies from early-stage startups to enterprise organizations.
about.teamJasperBio: Jasper brings a sharp eye for detail and a deep understanding of design systems. He turns complex problems into elegant, scalable interfaces.
about.teamErwinBio: Erwin bridges the gap between design and engineering. He builds performant, pixel-perfect front-ends that bring our designs to life.

work.title: Projects
work.subtitle: A selection of projects where we helped teams build better products.

services.title: Expertise
services.subtitle: From research to launch, we cover every stage of the product design process.
services.ctaText: Let's discuss how we can help you create a better experience for your users.

blog.title: Articles
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on design, AI, and building better products.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Pick the package that fits your needs.
pricing.ctaText: Let's talk about your project and find the right setup together.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it.

footer.tagline: Everything we design starts at the core — where user needs meet business goals.

metadata.siteDescription: Digital product design from the center out. We shape tomorrow's digital products with clarity and impact.
